title: eval-case.v1
description: Schema for an eval case's metadata.json. A case folder contains prompt.md, input/, expected/, and metadata.json; this schema formalizes the canonical metadata.json field list used by every skill's eval cases.

id.description: Unique case id; kebab-case, prefixed with the skill name (e.g. "ci-log-reducer-truncated-log").

skill.description: Name of the skill under test; must match an existing skills/<name>/ directory and the skill's frontmatter name.

bucket.description: Case category. Every skill ships at least one adversarial case.

arms.description: Subset of the v0 eval arms this case runs under.

publishability.description: Publication status of the case and its fixtures. "internal" for all v0 cases; further values arrive with the publishing-policy workstream via a schema_version bump.

command.description: Canonical validator invocation as an argv array. By convention it points at the skill's scripts/validate_*.ts via bun, with case gold paths as args. The harness appends/fills the fixed argv contract: <cmd> --case <case_dir> --workspace <workspace_dir> --out <result_path>.

expected_status.description: Status the validator must return when replayed against the case's gold expected/ artifacts. Good-failure cases expect "fail".

notes.description: Optional free-form author notes about the case.
